pubmed_links: [Miao et al. (2019) Network analysis of depression-related transcriptomic profiles](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/30825116/)
summary: RNF150 was identified as one of three genes significantly associated with depression symptoms via blood transcriptomic profiling in an aging cohort (P = 1.4×10⁻⁷), with depression-related genes enriched in the neurotrophin signaling pathway. Evidence linking RNF150 to core neuropsychiatric or neurodevelopmental disorders such as autism, schizophrenia, or intellectual disability is currently lacking. (novel candidate)
